changes.reason: Enable the already profile-scoped charm-pin tail-risk signature instead of adding a broad global entry filter; the worst MAE row is charm_pin_pullback_long and already matches most tail-risk dimensions.
Current 70 floor misses the -527 MAE charm-pin row at setup 61.99; lowering to 60 keeps this as a conditional tail signature rather than a generic setup-quality filter.
Current 6 cap misses the worst row at rolling-high distance 14.75; widening to 15 targets the delayed-profit extended pullback/rejection state shown in the autopsy.
Keep the signature focused on weak-to-moderate trend strength while allowing the worst row at ADX 17.95 to qualify; avoid reaching into strong-trend charm-pin winners.

expected_effect: Should reduce or remove the -527 charm_pin_pullback_long tail and improve average MAE/exposure quality. Trade count and net profit may fall modestly if the signature catches a few profitable but slow charm-pin recoveries; reject if retained net profit drops below 98% of run_001 or fast winners are materially reduced.
label: charm-pin-tail-risk-capture
rationale: The latest bad-MAE evidence points to a profitable but tail-heavy charm_pin_pullback_long cluster, not a missing-0DTE problem. The worst trade had VALID_0DTE, ES-VWAP distance 26.20, negative VWAP acceleration, weak RSI/ADX, pullback from high 9.75, rolling-high distance 14.75, and setup 61.99. This experiment uses the existing profile-matched charm-pin tail-risk veto path rather than repeating failed no-0DTE fallback tightening or broad extended-VWAP pruning.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long produced 34 trades and $1237.7 PnL but owns the global worst MAE at -527.0; the worst row is an extended-above-VWAP charm-pin pullback with weak momentum and delayed TP.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Pin Conditional Tail Gate
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The signature may block some profitable charm-pin recoveries; reject if charm-pin retained PnL or total net profit falls materially without improving worst MAE.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE charm_pin_pullback_long entries with high VWAP extension, weak momentum, significant pullback/rejection distance, and moderate setup quality.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Worst MAE improves from -527 toward <= -403 while total net profit stays >=98% of run_001 and fast_under_15m trades remain within 3 of baseline.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: The sample is a highly favorable long-only regime: 105 completed trades, 100% realized win rate, no slow >=12h trades, portfolio drawdown about 0.4%, and strong fast-trade contr...

new_strategy_ideas.name: Charm Pin Tail State Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Reduce worst MAE from -527 toward <= -375 while retaining at least 90% of charm_pin_pullback_long PnL and preserving fast-winner count.

new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: 1DTE combined PnL/exposure hour improves or average MAE falls while total 1DTE PnL stays near $1298.7 baseline.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Dormant Pin-Avoid/Mean-Reversion Discovery Holdout
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Out-of-sample profile PnL positive with average MAE below active-profile median and no degradation in baseline profiles.

next_experiments.config_bias: No further fallback/no-0DTE tightening unless a separate run specifically targets stale-data robustness. Current evidence says it hurts objective and leaves worst MAE unchanged.
